title: UI Kit Dropdowns
description: Dropdown selectors, items, and menus for form inputs and navigation

selector.name: Dropdown Selector
selector.description: Dropdown trigger button that opens a menu of options

items.name: Dropdown Items
items.description: Individual selectable items within dropdown menus

menu.name: Dropdown Menu
menu.description: Container for dropdown items, appears below selector when expanded

recreationGuide.description: How to recreate dropdowns using text-to-figma tools
recreationGuide.step1_createSelector: const selector = create_frame({ name: 'Dropdown Selector', layoutMode: 'HORIZONTAL', itemSpacing: 8, padding: 12, width: 143, height: 48 }); set_fills({ nodeId: selector.frameId, color: '#2A1139' }); set_stroke({ nodeId: selector.frameId, strokeWeight: 1, strokeColor: '#3D1F50', strokeAlign: 'INSIDE' }); set_corner_radius({ nodeId: selector.frameId, radius: 8 }); set_layout_align({ nodeId: selector.frameId, primaryAxis: 'SPACE_BETWEEN', counterAxis: 'CENTER' });
recreationGuide.step2_addLabel: const label = create_text({ content: 'Select option', parentId: selector.frameId, fontSize: 16, color: '#CEB6D8' });
recreationGuide.step4_createMenu: const menu = create_frame({ name: 'Dropdown Menu', layoutMode: 'VERTICAL', itemSpacing: 0, padding: 8, horizontalSizing: 'HUG', verticalSizing: 'HUG' }); set_fills({ nodeId: menu.frameId, color: '#2A1139' }); set_stroke({ nodeId: menu.frameId, strokeWeight: 1, strokeColor: '#3D1F50', strokeAlign: 'INSIDE' }); set_corner_radius({ nodeId: menu.frameId, radius: 8 }); apply_effects({ nodeId: menu.frameId, effects: [{ type: 'DROP_SHADOW', x: 0, y: 4, blur: 16, spread: 0, color: '#1D092F', opacity: 0.2 }] }); set_visible({ nodeId: menu.frameId, visible: false }); // Hidden by default
recreationGuide.step5_addItems: const item = create_frame({ name: 'Dropdown Item', parentId: menu.frameId, layoutMode: 'HORIZONTAL', padding: 12, horizontalSizing: 'FILL', height: 48 }); const itemText = create_text({ content: 'Option 1', parentId: item.frameId, fontSize: 16, color: '#CEB6D8' }); // Repeat for each option
recreationGuide.step6_forHover: // On hover: set_fills({ nodeId: item.frameId, color: '#221134' }); set_fills({ nodeId: itemText.nodeId, color: '#FFFFFF' });
recreationGuide.step7_forSelected: // On select: set_fills({ nodeId: item.frameId, color: '#221134' }); set_fills({ nodeId: itemText.nodeId, color: '#FFFFFF' }); // Add checkmark icon
recreationGuide.step8_forExpanded: // When selector clicked: set_visible({ nodeId: menu.frameId, visible: true }); set_rotation({ nodeId: iconId, rotation: 180 }); set_stroke({ nodeId: selector.frameId, strokeColor: '#25ECFF' });

usageExamples.forms: Country, state, or category selection in forms

_extraction_notes.status: COMPLETE - Dropdown system documented with selector, items, menu, and specialized variants
